free_text: Studies of (alpha,d) reactions on N=28 nuclei. I.
51V(alpha,d)53Cr
Department of Physics, Faculty of Science
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid. Metal powder
evaporated onto carbon foils
- Target-thickness is 0.050,0.054 mg/cm**2. Determined
by comparing the elastic scattering yields of 5.6
MeV protons with the cross sections given by the
Rutherford formula at forward angles
- Backing is carbon.
- Backing-thickness is about 0.030 mg/cm**2.
E-RSL is about 80 keV.
To detect reaction products
Statistical uncertainty
Maximum uncertainty due to uncertainties in
the target thickness mainly
